hero.subhead1: Mnemo analyzes your mock-test mistakes, builds flashcards targeting your weak spots, and schedules reviews so you actually remember.
hero.subhead2: Built for IELTS learners going from band 6.5 to 7.0–7.5.
hero.ctaClarifier: No password required. Sign in via email link.

methodology.heading: How Mnemo works
methodology.subhead: Three steps from mock test to long-term recall.

columns.heading: Analyze your mock test
columns.body: Upload a photo of your incorrect answers. Mnemo reads your handwriting and identifies the vocabulary, grammar, and collocations you got wrong.

columns.heading: Personalized flashcards
columns.body: Mnemo generates 10-30 flashcards targeting your weak spots. Every card is graded by the Quality Engine before joining your deck.

columns.heading: FSRS review schedule
columns.body: FSRS decides when you need to review each card — not too soon, not too late. Remember longer, study less.

whyWorks.heading: Why Mnemo works
whyWorks.para1: FSRS isn't a new algorithm. Spaced repetition has been validated by Anki — the open-source flashcard app — for nearly 20 years. Mnemo uses FSRS-5, the most current version, tuned on millions of reviews from learners worldwide.
whyWorks.para2: Anki bridge: you can import .apkg files into Mnemo and export them back any time. This feature is free forever, even after Mnemo has paid tiers. If you don't like Mnemo, you lose nothing.
whyWorks.para3: Mnemo has no streaks, no levels, no cute mascot reminding you to study. This is a tool for serious learners — not a study game.

pricingCallout.body: Mnemo is currently in beta: free for the first 100 users. Paid tiers come after beta — beta users get grandfather pricing for life.

ctaSection.heading: Mnemo is open for the first 100
ctaSection.body: Join now, or join the waitlist if beta is full.

footer.tagline: Mnemo — turn what you study into what you know

dashboard.placeholder: Mnemo is still being built. You'll get an email when it's ready.

upload.pageSubhead: Pick a test type and upload a photo or PDF. Max 10 MB.
upload.filePickerCta: Pick an image or PDF from your device
upload.fileHint: Supported: JPG, PNG, HEIC, PDF. Max 10 MB.

errors.tooLarge: File is too large. Max 10 MB.
errors.unsupported: Unsupported format. Use JPG, PNG, HEIC, or PDF.

detail.placeholder: Analysis will be ready in a few minutes.

inFlight.title: Analyzing your test…
inFlight.body: Mnemo is reading the test and identifying weaknesses. This usually takes 10–30 seconds.

failed.title: Analysis failed
failed.body: Mnemo could not analyze this test. Please try again.

timeout.title: Took too long
timeout.body: Analysis did not complete within 90 seconds. Please try again.
